omegaEdit.description: A byte-level data editor VS Code extension powered by Ωedit™
omegaEdit.configuration.title: Ωedit™ Data Editor
omegaEdit.configuration.serverPort.descr: TCP port for the OmegaEdit gRPC server; explicitly setting it opts out of Unix socket transport on macOS/Linux
omegaEdit.configuration.logLevel.descrip: Log level for the OmegaEdit client
omegaEdit.configuration.bytesPerRow.desc: Number of bytes displayed per row in the hex view. Values must be 8 through 64.
omegaEdit.configuration.language.descrip: Language for the Svelte data editor UI. Use auto to follow VS Code's display language.
omegaEdit.configuration.transformPluginD: Directories containing OmegaEdit transform plugin shared libraries
omegaEdit.configuration.allowExperimenta: Load experimental OmegaEdit transform plugins from configured or bundled plugin directories.
omegaEdit.configuration.saveConflictFing: Digest algorithm used by the native guarded save path to verify that a conflict was caused by OmegaEdit's own Auto Save. SHA-256 is the recommended default.
omegaEdit.configuration.checkpointHistor: Maximum temporary checkpoint-history storage for one open editor session, in bytes.
Maximum temporary checkpoint-history storage across all editor sessions, in bytes.
Maximum number of archived checkpoints retained for one open editor session.
Days to retain inaccessible crash diagnostics before checkpoint-history cleanup.
omegaEdit.command.openInHexEditor.title: OmegaEdit: Open in Data Editor
omegaEdit.command.goToOffset.title: OmegaEdit: Go to Offset
omegaEdit.command.searchNext.title: OmegaEdit: Search Next
omegaEdit.command.searchPrevious.title: OmegaEdit: Search Previous
omegaEdit.command.undo.title: OmegaEdit: Undo
omegaEdit.command.redo.title: OmegaEdit: Redo
omegaEdit.command.setTextEncoding.title: OmegaEdit: Set Text Encoding
omegaEdit.command.exportChangeLog.title: OmegaEdit: Export Change Log
omegaEdit.command.previewChangeLog.title: OmegaEdit: Preview Change Log
omegaEdit.command.applyChangeLog.title: OmegaEdit: Apply Change Log
omegaEdit.command.rollbackSession.title: OmegaEdit: Roll Back Session
omegaEdit.command.createCheckpoint.title: OmegaEdit: Create Checkpoint
omegaEdit.command.getEditorState.title: OmegaEdit: Get Editor State
omegaEdit.command.loadRangeMap.title: OmegaEdit: Load Range Map
omegaEdit.command.unloadRangeMap.title: OmegaEdit: Unload Range Map
